news.t: From Coke to GM: Decode the Q1 Earnings Wave Through ETFs
Bumpy September for auto ETFs as UAW strike, higher rates weigh

holdings.infoBox: FTXR is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are General Motors Company stock at 7.87%, Ford Motor Company at 7.73%, Tesla at 7.53%, Union Pacific at 7.44%, and United Parcel Service at 6.50%.

overview.description: The First Trust Nasdaq Transportation ETF (FTXR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq US Smart Transportation index. The fund tracks an index composed of 30 US transportation companies. Holdings are selected by liquidity and weighted based on volatility, value and growth factors. FTXR was launched on Sep 20, 2016 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: From Coke to GM: Decode the Q1 Earnings Wave Through ETFs
data.text: While the markets are generally fixated on what the Magnificent Seven is doing in terms of first-quarter earnings, there are other names investors may want to track. This morning's earnings bonanza wa...

data.title: Bumpy September for auto ETFs as UAW strike, higher rates weigh
data.text: Exchange-traded funds tracking automakers saw net outflows last month on worries over the United Auto Workers' (UAW) strike against the "Detroit Three" and higher interest rates.

data.title: ETF Spotlight: Ford sees strong recovery from pandemic lows
data.text: CNBC's David Faber takes a look at the First Trust Nasdaq Transportation ETF as as company's recover from the lows of the pandemic but face global chip shortages slowing production.

data.title: Best Transportation ETFs for Q1 2021
data.text: The best transportation ETFs for Q1 2021 are IYT, FTXR, and XTN.
